---
title: "CV"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.cv-frame {
  width: 100%;
  height: 85vh;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 6px;
}
</style>
```

My current curriculum vitae is available below. If you prefer, you can also [open the PDF directly in a new tab](assets/cv.pdf){target="_blank"}.

```{=html}
<iframe src="assets/cv.pdf" title="Curriculum Vitae" class="cv-frame"></iframe>
```
